column1:
Declare and initialize character variables in programming languages such as C, C++, and Java.  
Output multiple character variables together in a single statement correctly, understanding string concatenation versus numeric addition.  
Understand that characters are internally stored as numeric ASCII (or Unicode) values and use this knowledge for character manipulation.  
Implement and use escape sequences to represent special characters in output statements.  
Read single character input from users in programming languages, including handling language-specific input methods.
